logs

11.jul.26 i honestly found this game so cool but i might get it at Some Point when it gets a discount because during the demo i noticed some of the translation is a bit off. which is kinda crucial for a video game where all you do is read. but nonetheless, i really love the look of this game. it has a little section where you can go out and walk around and that feels really nice and special since you are mostly looking at a computer and typing.

screenshots

if you are adding me to any of these, please send me a message or an e-mail to me know who you are! i don't accept requests from people i don't know :p
